    Index

    A C D E F G H I L M P R S T U V 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    G

    getAddButton() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the button used to add a new task.
    getAssigneeFilterComboBox() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the combo box used for filtering tasks by assignee.
    getAssigneeInput() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the currently selected assignee from the dropdown.
    getAssignees() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the assignees of this task.
    getCommentButton() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the button used to add comments to a task.
    getComments() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the comments of this task.
    getCreationDate() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the creation date of this task.
    getDeadline() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the deadline of this task.
    getDeadlineInput() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the current text input for the deadline.
    getDeleteButton() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the button used to delete a task.
    getDescription() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the description of this task.
    getDescriptionInput() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the current text input for the task's description.
    getEditButton() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the button used to edit a task.
    getFilterComboBox() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the combo box used for filtering tasks by status.
    getFilteredTasks(String, String) - Methode in Klasse model.ProjectModel
    Gets a filtered list of tasks based on status and assignee criteria.
    getHelpButton() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the button used to display help and FAQ.
    getInitialTimeInput() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the current text input for the initial time.
    getSortComboBox() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the combo box used for sorting tasks.
    getStartTimerButton() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the button used to start time tracking.
    getStatus() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the status of this task.
    getTasks() - Methode in Klasse model.ProjectModel
    Gets a shallow copy of the current list of tasks.
    getTimeSpentInSeconds() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the time spent on this task in seconds.
    getTitle() - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Gets the title of this task.
    getTitleInput() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the current text input for the task's title.
    getToggleStatusButton() - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Gets the button used to toggle a task's status.
